settings.heading: Never run out of your dog's favorite chew.
settings.subheading: Build a flexible Prime Pet Food yak chew routine with automatic deliveries and savings for repeat chew time.
settings.problem_heading: Good chew routines fall apart when you run out.
settings.problem_text: If your dog relies on chewing for enrichment, missed restocks can mean more boredom and more emergency treat runs.
settings.solution_heading: Subscriptions make enrichment easier to maintain.
settings.solution_text: Set a routine, save on repeat orders, and keep your dog's favorite yak chews arriving on schedule.
settings.review_1: Subscription keeps us from running out.
settings.review_2: Easy routine and my dog gets the chews he loves.
settings.review_3: Great for households that use yak chews every week.
settings.product_text: Subscribe & Save helps you keep calmer chew routines stocked without manual reordering.
settings.final_text: A better routine is easier when the chews arrive before you need them.
